name: STG · AI · Webhook → Operator Memory Read · DHR
description: AI | Queries Supabase operator_memory for a user (with optional tag filter), formats rows as a context string for Claude. Returns {memories, count}. OWNER: Dhruv | p2:normal | ai-powered | ENV: STG

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, memories: $json.memories, count: $json.count, has_memories: $json.has_memories }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_name: 'STG · AI · Webhook → Operator Memory Read · DHR', error_message: $json.error.message, error_node: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted, execution_id: $execution.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
